raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ar teem/ kas eekſch to
Preesteu Raddu-Raksteem lih-
dſinati tappe pehz ſawu Tehwu
Nammu/ ir tee Lewiti/ kas di-
wideſmits un wairak Gaddus
wezzi bija pee winnu Wakteſcha-
nas pehz ſawahm Kahrtahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tee/ kas Raddu-Rak-
ſôs lihdſinati tappe ar ſawuem
Behrneem/ Seewahm/un Deb-
leem/ un Meitahm / zaur wiſu
Drandſibu/ jo tee ſivehtija ar
Peetizzibu tahs (apfohltas)
ſivehtas Leetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir starp Aârona Behr-
neem teem Preestereem/ us to
Preekſch-Pilsfahtu Tihruumeem
wiſôs winnu Pilsfahtôs bija
Wihti/ kas pa Wahrdeem fauk-
tt bija/ ka teem bij Dallibu doht
wiſeem no Wihta Kahrtasſarp
teen Preestereem/ un kas Rad-
Du-Rakſtôs starp teem Lewiteem
lihdſinati tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta darrija Iſkijus
eekſch wiſſa Juhda/ un darrija/
kas labs/ un pareiſi un teefa btja
preekſch ta KUNGA tawa
Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ikkurri Darba/ fo
wiſsch pee ta Deewa Namma
Kalpoſchanas tahze/ un pehz tahs
Bauslibas un Bausleem/ ſawu
Deewu metkeht/ to darrija wiſsch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXXII. Modalla.
Saneribs tas Kehniſch no Affirijsß k
prett Juhdu: 1. Iſkijus uſtiſz Deeſw
5. Saneribs Deewn gauschi ſaimo : 9/
Bet tohp no Deewafohdihts : 11. Un
Da atpeſihts: 22. Iſkijus tohp neweſ
24. Un atkat weſſels: 26. Winnam
daufs Baggatibas un Gohtibas: 27.
friht zaur to Grehkôs: 31. Mirſt/ un
na Dehls Manafus tohp pahr Kehni
33.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Etz tchahm Leeta
un winna peetiſzi
Padarrifchahu na
Saneribs/ tas Kehniſch no
firijas/ un zehſehs prett Juhd
un apmettehs prett teem ſtipre
Pilſtahteim/ un dohnaja ta
pee ſewin raut.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Iſkijus redſeja/
Saneribs atnahze/ un tas
apaehmeeß prett Jeruſalemi k
roht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad turreja wiſſch Pad
mu ar ſaweeim Leeleem-Kunge
un warreneem Karra-Wihre
to Awoſchu Uhdeni aiſtaisil
kas us Ahrapuſſi ta Pilsfal
btja/ un tee palihdſeja tain.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo dauds Lauschu tap
fapulzinati/ kas wiſſus Am
ſhus aiſtaisija/ ir to Uppi/
Widdu zaur to Semuni tezzej
jo tee ſazzija: Kapchz bij tee
Affireu Kehniſeem nahkt /
dauds Uhdens atrast.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſch nehmahs dro
ſhu Prahtu/ un darrija zretu
un uſtaisija wiſſu Muhri/
tas bija plihtis/ un uſwilkę
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
